rationale: The one substantive GT concern (yenuo26 questioning whether reduce_scatter verification was added to the test) is explicitly engaged by X, which calls out those exact assertions (lines 121-126) in its validation sweep and separately flags a real, verifiable gap: the new TestSetForwardContextDPMetadata tests never exercise the dp_group=None/world_size<=1 early-return branch. X's second finding (missing comment on the cfg_parallel_size>1 guard removal) is also accurate and concretely actionable. Y produces a thorough but ultimately approve-everything review; its only comment is a vague 'worth a one-line comment' suggestion with no concrete ask, and it never engages the reduce_scatter test-coverage thread the human reviewer raised. Neither includes a LATENT GAP CHECK section.
